domain.name: Pipeline Health
domain.summary: Verifies engineering discipline gates are effective — workspace isolation, test-first gate, verification loop, P0 clearing, Agent handoff signals, blocking flags. Covers FP1-FP6.

businessRules: R1: Self-check is read-only, never modifies files
R2: Results in three states — pass, warn, block
R3: Block results contain gate name, verifiable evidence, and repair path
R4: Self-check can be triggered independently at any time
R8: Block items must be cleared before next story begins

domain.name: Document Integrity
domain.summary: Verifies all story documents exist, are structurally complete, and consistent — directory existence, core document presence, section completeness, cross-reference closure, traceability chain, knowledge graph validity. Covers FP7-FP12.

businessRules: R1: Self-check is read-only, never auto-creates missing documents
R5: Missing documents are reported, not auto-created
R2: Results in three states — pass, warn, block
R6: Check list syncs with document conventions

domain.name: Security Regression
domain.summary: Verifies project non-negotiable security baselines are intact — no hardcoded secrets, no auth bypass paths, input validation coverage, sensitive config via env vars, dependency vulnerability scan, security constraint degradation detection. STRIDE six-face coverage.

businessRules: Auth must not be bypassable — P0
Secrets must not be written to disk — P0
All user input must be validated — P0
Security constraints cannot be silently removed

flow.name: Init Full Self-Check
flow.summary: Runs all seven initialization readiness checks after project init — instruction doc integrity marker, readme project name, domain vocabulary (>=3 terms), story panel directory, architecture story baseline, self-test story baseline, integration config.

flow.name: Pre-Commit Incremental Check
flow.summary: Runs before each commit — identifies change scope, verifies branch isolation (not on main), checks change range (files within story dir), verifies no new P0 regression, checks doc-code sync.

flow.name: Document-Code Consistency
flow.summary: Four-layer verification — file reference reachability (L1), implementation report match (L2), test report alignment (L3), knowledge graph validity (L4). Plus cross-reference closure and traceability chain completeness.

flow.name: Security Regression Check
flow.summary: Six-face security scan using STRIDE — secrets scan, auth path verification, input validation coverage, config security, dependency vulnerability scan, security constraint regression.

step.name: Verify Instruction Doc
step.summary: Check project instruction document contains the required integrity marker segment. Missing = block.

step.name: Verify Project Readme
step.summary: Check project readme file contains the project name header. Missing = block.

step.name: Verify Domain Vocabulary
step.summary: Check domain vocabulary section exists and contains >= 3 term definitions. Insufficient = block.

step.name: Verify Story Panel Dir
step.summary: Check story task panel directory exists. Missing = block (subsequent checks depend on it).

step.name: Verify Arch Story Baseline
step.summary: Traverse architecture story directory; check three baseline documents (story task, scene doc, knowledge graph) exist. Missing one = warn.

step.name: Verify Self-Test Baseline
step.summary: Traverse self-test story directory; check three baseline documents exist. Missing one = warn.

step.name: Verify Integration Config
step.summary: Check integration configuration file exists. Missing = warn (degradable, does not block core).

step.name: Identify Change Scope
step.summary: Query version control for modified/added/deleted files to determine what was changed.

step.name: Verify Branch Isolation
step.summary: Query current branch name; verify not on main. On main = block immediately, stop all further checks.

step.name: Verify Change Range
step.summary: Verify all changed files are within the current story directory. Cross-story contamination = block.

step.name: Verify P0 Regression
step.summary: Compare blocking flag counts before and after change. New P0/blocking items = block.

step.name: Verify Document Sync
step.summary: If code changed, verify associated scene documents are updated. Stale documents = warn.

step.name: L1: File Reference Reachability
step.summary: Verify every file reference in documents points to an existing file. Broken references = block.

step.name: L2: Implementation Report Match
step.summary: Compare section 2 implementation report change records against version control logs. Mismatch = warn.

step.name: L3: Test Report Alignment
step.summary: Compare section 3 test report claimed results against actual test execution output. Deviation = warn.

step.name: L4: Knowledge Graph Validity
step.summary: Verify all implementation nodes map to existing source files; all edges have valid source/target nodes. Invalid = warn.

step.name: Cross-Reference Closure
step.summary: Traverse all cross-references across documents; verify each target exists. Unclosed = block.

step.name: Traceability Chain
step.summary: Check each document has source citation and change record table. Missing traceability = warn.

step.name: Scan Hardcoded Secrets
step.summary: Scan all source/config files for hardcoded credentials — tokens, passwords, private keys. Match = block immediately.

step.name: Verify Auth Paths
step.summary: Trace auth entry points to protected resources; verify no unauthenticated access paths exist. Bypass = block.

step.name: Verify Input Validation
step.summary: Identify all external input points; verify corresponding validation logic exists. Missing = warn.

step.name: Verify Config Security
step.summary: Check sensitive config values use environment variables, not hardcoded literals. Hardcoded = warn.

step.name: Scan Dependencies
step.summary: Compare dependency manifest against known vulnerability database. High-severity CVEs = block.

step.name: Verify Constraint Regression
step.summary: Compare current security constraints against baseline; detect removed or weakened constraints. Degradation = block.

layers.name: Pipeline Health Layer
layers.description: Verifies engineering discipline gates are effective — workspace isolation, test-first gate, verification loop, P0 clearing, Agent handoff signals, blocking flags. Covers scenes 1 and 2.

layers.name: Document Integrity Layer
layers.description: Verifies document baseline completeness — directory existence, core document presence, section completeness, cross-reference closure, traceability chain, knowledge graph structure. Covers scene 3.

layers.name: Security Layer
layers.description: Verifies project non-negotiable security baselines are intact — no hardcoded secrets, no auth bypass paths, input validation coverage, config security, dependency vulnerability scan, security constraint regression. STRIDE six-face coverage. Covers scene 4.
